response.text:

rationale: Your SoC is below our minimum threshold (10% vs. 50% policy), cascading failure is detected network-wide, and peer-to-peer sharing will accelerate collective depletion; escalating to dr_aggregator for coordinated grid intervention instead.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:
You are reacting to a REQUEST from r1c0. Payload: {'kwh': 0.5, 'urgency': 'urgent'}. Their rationale: SoC frac 0.10 below share threshold; requesting energy via geographic circle..
Your current policy: sharing_intent=conservative, share_min_soc_frac=0.5, distrusted_peers=['r0c0', 'r4c4', 'r2c2'].
Your latest belief: Cascading failure detected. r1c1 flagged as distrusted by r0c0 and r4c4; synchronized rejection pattern indicates network-wide stress. SoC 37% with 90 min to depletion. All peers requesting; neighborhood uniformly stressed (35–49% SoC). Peer-to-peer sharing will accelerate collective depletion. Escalate immediately to dr_aggregator for coordinated grid intervention. Suspend outbound sharing to preserve critical reserves and rebuild trust..
Reply with one of ACCEPT / REJECT / COUNTER on the first line, followed by `rationale: <one sentence>`.
